ticket.title: ADD AUTO-SYNC OF SIGNUP USERS TO QUICKBOOKS ON REGISTRATION

test_cases.description: Verify that completing the Partner With Us signup form and payment automatically creates a matching customer record in QuickBooks.
test_cases.expected_result: A new customer record appears in QuickBooks once the LakbayHub account is created, with fields matching the signup data.
test_cases.actual_result: Account synced to QuickBooks automatically after payment as expected.

test_cases.description: Verify synced fields (name, email, company name, etc.) match exactly across the signup form, LakbayHub, and QuickBooks.
test_cases.expected_result: All fields match exactly with no truncation, mismatch, or missing data.
test_cases.actual_result: Company Name field match between LakbayHub and QuickBooks.

test_cases.description: Verify no QuickBooks record is created if the partner abandons the signup flow before completing payment.
test_cases.expected_result: No customer record is created in QuickBooks since the account was never finalized in LakbayHub.
test_cases.actual_result: No QuickBooks record created for incomplete/unpaid signups, as expected.

test_cases.description: Verify the system does not create duplicate QuickBooks records for an email already registered as a partner.
test_cases.expected_result: System blocks the duplicate signup, or does not create a second duplicate customer record in QuickBooks.
test_cases.actual_result: No duplicate customer record created for existing partner email.

test_cases.description: Verify QuickBooks sync behavior when the partner's email remains unverified after signup and payment.
test_cases.expected_result: Sync behavior matches intended design for unverified email accounts.
test_cases.actual_result: Sync proceeds as expected regardless of email verification status.

test_cases.description: Verify special characters in Name/Profession/Facebook Link fields sync correctly to QuickBooks without corruption.
test_cases.expected_result: Special characters are preserved accurately in QuickBooks with no encoding errors.
test_cases.actual_result: Special characters synced correctly with no corruption.

test_cases.description: Verify that once a partner completes signup and pays online, the account is automatically added to LakbayHub and automatically synced to QuickBooks with no manual step required.
test_cases.expected_result: Account is automatically added to LakbayHub and automatically synced to QuickBooks immediately after payment, with no manual intervention needed.
test_cases.actual_result: After payment, QuickBooks sync does not fire automatically. The user must first edit their info and save before the record is pushed to QuickBooks.
test_cases.comments: Sync depends on manual edit+save action post-payment; defeats the purpose of true auto-sync on registration.
